title: Electric Violin Bare-Bones Starter Packet
build_target: solid-body 4-string electric violin with optional 5-string variant
artifact_focus: L2 starter packet for electric bowed string prototype planning

cultural_provenance.claim: This packet is an engineering scaffold for an electric violin prototype. It does not claim historical violin-making authority, measured acoustic performance, or production-ready electronics.

physical_design_anchors.scale_length: 328 mm / 12.91 in baseline assumption; verify against final bridge and setup
physical_design_anchors.tuning: G3-D4-A4-E5 baseline with optional C3-G3-D4-A4-E5 variant
physical_design_anchors.pickup: piezo bridge assumed; exact bridge and preamp require sourced hardware drawings
physical_design_anchors.authority_boundary: design.md, validation.csv, real hardware measurements, CAD review, and setup tests outrank this showcase page

required_before_public: Select the 4-string or 5-string baseline and the actual pickup bridge.
Replace TBD validation rows with measured setup, stiffness, signal, and balance data.
Add CAD drawings or fabrication geometry reviewed against sourced hardware.
Verify sourceability, lead time, and pricing before purchase recommendations.
Photograph body layout, electronics, first signal test, and playing posture.

sources.title: Repository README
sources.credit: Electric violin packet summary and readiness boundary

sources.title: Design document
sources.credit: String model assumptions and unresolved CAD/electronics gaps

sources.title: Validation table
sources.credit: TBD measurement plan for scale, tension, stiffness, signal, balance, and action

notes: Starter scaffold only; do not treat generic hardware assumptions as sourced dimensions.
Use the HTML print packet for review, but update it after measured values and sourced hardware are available.
